var buttons = document.querySelectorAll('button.answer'); var results = []; buttons.forEach(function(btn){ var t = btn.querySelector('.answer__text'); var l = btn.querySelector('.answer__label'); var val = ''; if(t && t.innerText.trim()!='') val = t.innerText.trim(); else if(l && l.innerText.trim()!='') val = l.innerText.trim(); else val = ''; results.push(val); }); return results;
var list = JSON.parse(${myList}); var ans = ${answers}; for(var i=0;i<ans.length;i++){ if(list.includes(ans[i])) return i+1; } return -1;
